title: Madras High Court restrains illegal broadcast of Vijay film Jana Nayagan
description: The Madras High Court on Thursday passed an interim order restraining cable operators and internet service providers from illegally broadcasting or facilitating access to pirated copies of the Vijay-starrer film Jana Nayagan [KVN productions Vs BSNL].Justice Senthilkumar Ramamoorthy passed the order in a suit filed by KVN Productions LLP, the co-producer of the film, which alleged that the movie had been leaked online even before receiving certification from the Central Board of Film Certificati
